# JoogadTools.online

> Free, fast, and private browser-based tools for developers and everyday users.

## About

JoogadTools is a collection of 27+ free online tools that run 100% client-side in your browser. No data is ever uploaded to any server — all processing happens locally on your device, ensuring complete privacy and speed.

## Website

https://joogadtools.online

## Tools

- QR Code Generator: https://joogadtools.online/tools/qr-generator/index.html
- Password Generator: https://joogadtools.online/tools/password-generator/index.html
- Case Converter: https://joogadtools.online/tools/case-converter/index.html
- Color Converter: https://joogadtools.online/tools/color-converter/index.html
- JSON/CSV Converter: https://joogadtools.online/tools/json-csv-converter/index.html
- CSV Generator: https://joogadtools.online/tools/csv-generator/index.html
- EMI Calculator: https://joogadtools.online/tools/emi-calculator/index.html
- GST Calculator: https://joogadtools.online/tools/gst-calculator/index.html
- Image Quality Checker: https://joogadtools.online/tools/image-quality-checker/index.html
- Image Compressor: https://joogadtools.online/tools/image-compressor/index.html
- PNG Trimmer: https://joogadtools.online/tools/png-trimmer/index.html
- ZIP Master: https://joogadtools.online/tools/zip-master/index.html
- Word Counter: https://joogadtools.online/tools/word-counter/index.html
- Hash Generator: https://joogadtools.online/tools/hash-generator/index.html
- Handwriting to Text (OCR): https://joogadtools.online/tools/handwriting-to-text/index.html
- Insta Grid Splitter: https://joogadtools.online/tools/image-grid-splitter/index.html
- Age Calculator: https://joogadtools.online/tools/age-calculator/index.html
- Historical Date Calculator: https://joogadtools.online/tools/historical-date-calculator/index.html
- Hindu Panchang: https://joogadtools.online/tools/hindu-panchang/index.html
- Chart Generator: https://joogadtools.online/tools/chart-generator/index.html
- Bulk Map QR Codes: https://joogadtools.online/tools/bulk-map-qr/index.html
- Map to CSV Extractor: https://joogadtools.online/tools/map-csv-generator/index.html
- Passport Photo Maker: https://joogadtools.online/tools/passport-photo-maker/index.html
- PDF Password Remover: https://joogadtools.online/tools/pdf-password-remover/index.html
- CipherArt Studio: https://joogadtools.online/tools/cipherart-studio/index.html
- Halftone Converter: https://joogadtools.online/tools/halftone-converter/index.html
- Secret Studio: https://joogadtools.online/tools/secret-studio/index.html

## Key Features

- 100% Client-Side: All tools run in the browser. No server uploads.
- Free Forever: No sign-ups, no paywalls, no limits.
- Privacy First: Your data never leaves your device.
- Modern UI: Dark-themed glassmorphism design with smooth animations.

## Contact

Website: https://joogadtools.online
